items.title: Anthropic begged the world to stop AI… then shipped this

items.content:
<article>Render is the easiest place to ship full-stack apps and agents. The first 2,000 people to use the code RENDER-FIRESHIP will get $50 in credits: https://dashboard.render.com/register?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic_video&utm_campaign=2026_partnership_fireship

- Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8

items.title: Google’s AI endgame is here… everything you missed at I/O 2026
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Try using Emergent's specialized agents in parallel to build any full-stack application - https://app.emergent.sh/?utm_shift=redirect&via=fireship
